title: Add toast notification system with history panel

changes.description: Zustand store for notification history with persistence, supporting add/markRead/clear operations
Notification system wrapper integrating with existing Base UI toast system: notify() helper function, NotificationHistory sheet panel component
Added NotificationHistory button to SidebarChromeFooter for accessing notification history panel

requirements_met: Create a notification store using Zustand in apps/web/src/stores/notificationStore.ts
Support types: success, error, warning, info with corresponding colors and icons
Notifications auto-dismiss after 5 seconds by default with configurable duration
Stack multiple notifications vertically with smooth enter/exit animations
Add a notification history panel accessible from the sidebar
